news.t: AI Ranks The VanEck Vectors Semiconductor ETF The Best Among This Month's Top US Tech Smart Beta ETFs
Best Tech ETFs For August As Sector Drives Growth In Markets
FANG ETFs lose ground as investors rotate away from tech
Tech ETFs roar higher as end of bear market beckons

holdings.infoBox: PNQI is an equity ETF with a total of 79 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 9.49%, Alphabet at 9.45%, Apple at 9.23%, Microsoft at 8.20%, and Meta Platforms at 7.24%.

overview.description: The Invesco NASDAQ Internet ETF (PNQI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ Internet index, a modified-market-cap-weighted index of Internet companies listed in the US. PNQI was launched on Jun 12, 2008 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: FANG ETFs lose ground as investors rotate away from tech
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to technology heavyweights slumped midday Tuesday as those stocks faltered.

data.title: Tech ETFs roar higher as end of bear market beckons
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to internet technology stocks surged Tuesday on the heels of a broader bounce in tech.

data.title: ETF Spotlight: Netflix is the best performer of the day
data.text: CNBC's Dom Chu reports on strong performance from Netflix after its decision to raise subscription prices.
